# img2vid

> A Python CLI and Flask tool for converting image folders into crossfaded MP4 videos with audio soundtrack support.

## Overview

img2vid takes an ordered folder of images and converts them into a video slideshow with configurable crossfade transitions and optional audio overlay.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/cocodedk/img2vid
- Website (EN): https://cocodedk.github.io/img2vid/
- Website (FA): https://cocodedk.github.io/img2vid/fa/
- Download: https://github.com/cocodedk/img2vid/releases/latest/download/img2vid.zip
- Author: https://cocode.dk
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/babakbandpey

## Technical Details

- Language: Python 3.12
- Package manager: uv
- Frameworks: Flask 3.0 (web), Click (CLI), moviepy (video)
- License: Apache-2.0

## Key Files

- `src/img2vid/` — Core package
- `src/img2vid/converter.py` — Video conversion logic
- `src/img2vid/cli.py` — CLI entry point
- `pyproject.toml` — Project configuration
- `CLAUDE.md` — AI session instructions
